top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.country = 'Germany' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.country IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT country 
    FROM circuits 
    WHERE country LIKE '%Europe%' OR country IN ('Austria', 'Belgium', 'France', 'Germany', 'Hungary', 'Italy', 'Monaco', 'Netherlands', 'Portugal', 'Spain', 'Sweden', 'Switzerland', 'United Kingdom')
);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.country = 'Germany' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_germany_races
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.country IN ('Germany', 'United Kingdom', 'France', 'Italy', 'Spain', 'Monaco', 'Belgium', 'Netherlands', 'Austria', 'Switzerland', 'Portugal', 'Sweden', 'Finland', 'Denmark', 'Norway', 'Greece', 'Turkey', 'Russia', 'Hungary', 'Czech Republic', 'Slovakia', 'Poland', 'Ukraine', 'Romania', 'Bulgaria', 'Croatia', '...

    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.country = 'Germany' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.country = 'Germany' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_germany_races
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.country IN ('Germany', 'United Kingdom', 'France', 'Italy', 'Spain', 'Monaco', 'Belgium', 'Netherlands', 'Austria', 'Switzerland', 'Portugal', 'Sweden', 'Finland', 'Denmark', 'Norway', 'Greece', 'Turkey', 'Russia', 'Hungary', 'Czech Republic', 'Slovakia', 'Poland', 'Ukraine', 'Romania', 'Bulgaria', 'Croatia', '...

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.country = 'Germany' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE r.name LIKE '%European Grand Prix%';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.country = 'Germany' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.country IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT country 
    FROM circuits 
    WHERE country LIKE '%Europe%' OR country IN ('Austria', 'Belgium', 'France', 'Germany', 'Hungary', 'Italy', 'Monaco', 'Netherlands', 'Portugal', 'Spain', 'Sweden', 'Switzerland', 'United Kingdom')
);
